name_en: Large size 41-34-19cm. ONTHEGO Monogram shoulder bag. A perennial bestseller with options for black leather or Monogram shoulder straps. The large size is indeed quite big; it is recommended for taller girls. The large Monogram logo looks very youthful and stylish.
